Projects

Drone Flight Controller

Building a drone from ground up with a team of three. Currently designing flight controller PCB.

  • Rust
  • Kalman Filter
  • RF

NixOS & Arch & Hyprland

My daily driving NixOS & Hyprland setup on a refurbished ThinkPad.

Autonomous Pet-Rescue Robot

Pet-rescue robot for 2025 ENPH253 robot competition. Line-following robot with a robotic arm, 2D LiDAR detection algorithm, and cascading basket deploying mechanism

  • 3DCAD
  • Onshape
  • 3D printing
  • ESP32
  • C++
  • KiCad
  • LiDAR

Autonomous Clue Detect Robot

Autonomous clue detecting robot for the ENPH 353 competition. Worked in Gazebo/ROS simulation environment and implemented FSM integrating dual-lane PID drive, OCR CNN.

  • Gazebo
  • ROS
  • Python
  • FSM
  • OpenCV
  • OCR CNN
  • PID
